text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Parcae has yet again concluded that I won't be
able to win another race. Given my situation, it's
a fair judgment. However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Trainer tells me to show everyone how tenacious I
am. Talk about being vague. But if I want to
convince people of my strength... I've got no
other choice.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
An incomprehensible phenomenon occurs after I
get back to my room. Parcae prompts me to reset
them to default. What in the actual hell is
happening here?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, Parcae seems to understand
that I'm not the same as the "Air Shakur" in their
data. Perhaps the time for us to part ways has
come. */
